title: oxydectes sonorae
intro: Oxydectes sonorae, also known as Sonoran Desert marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Oxydectes sonorae is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Oxydectes sonorae, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be used topically or internally to harness its potential health benefits.
